import io
import string

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int> 
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if is_space(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut has = false
      while i < n
        mut c = 0
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(v)
          c = v
        when None
          c = 0
        end
        if is_digit(c)
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          has = true
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
        end
        if i == n
          i = n
        end
        if not is_digit(c) and i <= n
          i = i
        end
      end
      if has
        result = __list_int_push(result, val * sign)
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let nums = parse_ints(input)
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut s = 1
  match nums.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    a = v
  when None
    a = 0
  end
  match nums.get(1)
  when Some(v)
    b = v
  when None
    b = 0
  end
  match nums.get(2)
  when Some(v)
    s = v
  when None
    s = 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut cur = a
  mut first = true
  while cur < b
    if first
      out = "#{cur}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{cur}"
    end
    cur = cur + s
  end
  println(out)
end
